subject: Ecology
title: Deforestation
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Deforestation.

hook.text: Every minute, an area of forest the size of 27 football fields is destroyed worldwide.

buildup.text: Agriculture drives 80% of deforestation—cattle ranching, soy, and palm oil lead the list.

discovery.text: Forests release all their stored carbon when burned or cleared, accelerating climate change.

twist.text: Deforestation also fragments habitats, isolating species that need large connected ranges.

climax.text: Tropical deforestation alone accounts for about 10% of global greenhouse gas emissions.

punchline.text: We are burning libraries of life we haven't read.

quiz.question: What drives most deforestation?
options: Agriculture, especially cattle and palm oil
